ValidationRule.description: disagree moving From Cancelled to Closed Stage
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),"Cancelled"), OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed Won"), ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed Lost") ) )&& $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can't change stage from Cancelled to Closed.
